exercises.title: Past Tense Practice
exercises.description:
Write the past tense of:
go, eat, see, study, make, have, play, run, take, write, come, give
hints: Some are regular (add -ed), most are irregular

solution.code:
went, ate, saw, studied, made,
had, played, ran, took, wrote,
came, gave

exercises.title: Future Form Selection
exercises.description:
Choose will, going to, or present continuous:
1. "I ___ help you." (just decided)
2. "We ___ visit grandma next Sunday." (planned)
3. "The meeting ___ start at 3pm." (schedule)
4. "Look! That building ___ fall!" (evidence)
5. "I ___ call you later." (promise)
hints: Spontaneous = will, Planned = going to, Arranged = present continuous, Schedule = present simple

solution.code:
1. will (spontaneous decision)
2. are going to visit (planned)
3. starts (schedule)
4. is going to fall (evidence-based prediction)
5. will call (promise)
